data.content_ref: inline:The candidate's forbidden case about Egyptian agricultural records showing no drought stress is contradicted by the candidate's own scope exclusion of Egypt; the forbidden case is therefore irrelevant to the claim, but the candidate fails to address that the Hittite heartland (covered) has textual evidence of grain shipments from Egypt and Canaan during the crisis, which undercuts the claim that drought alone caused simultaneous collapse across the covered regions.
